---
title: "API Deployment and Testing: NHANES Prediabetes Model"
author: "Zhalae Daneshvari, Jolene Ie, Nick Johnson"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# API Deployment
```{python}
# make board
import pandas as pd
import pins, os
from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder
from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from vetiver import VetiverModel, vetiver_pin_write

SA_KEY = "/home/ji92/proj-01-dank-corgi/service-auth.json"
os.environ["GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS"] = SA_KEY

board = pins.board_gcs(bucket="info-4940-models", path="ji92/", allow_pickle_read=True)

# data for api
DF_PATH = "data-raw/nhanes2123_prediabetes_features_labeled_clean.csv"
df = pd.read_csv(DF_PATH)
assert "prediabetes_flag" in df.columns, "Label missing in cleaned file."

X = df.drop(columns=["prediabetes_flag"])
y = df["prediabetes_flag"]

# fill NA exactly how inference will expect
for col in X.columns:
    if X[col].dtype == "O":
        X[col] = X[col].fillna("Unknown")
    else:
        X[col] = X[col].fillna(0)

# making the model
num_cols = X.select_dtypes(include=["number"]).columns
cat_cols = X.select_dtypes(include=["object"]).columns

pre = ColumnTransformer(
    transformers=[
        ("num", StandardScaler(), num_cols),
        ("cat", OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown="ignore"), cat_cols),
    ]
)

model = Pipeline(
    [
        ("pre", pre),
        ("logit", LogisticRegression(max_iter=1000)),
    ]
)

model.fit(X, y)

# vetiver wrap & pin
proto = X.iloc[[0]]  # small prototype defines API schema
v = VetiverModel(
    model=model,
    model_name="nhanes-prediabetes-py",
    prototype_data=proto,
)

vetiver_pin_write(board, v)
print("Pinned model: nhanes-prediabetes-py")

```


## Generate predictions from API
```{python}
# test api 

import requests
import pandas as pd

API = "http://appliedml.infosci.cornell.edu:3258"

#check API is alive
ping = requests.get(f"{API}/ping", timeout=5)
ping.raise_for_status()
print("PING:", ping.json())

#build ONE valid row from the same cleaned CSV used for training
df = pd.read_csv("data-raw/nhanes2123_prediabetes_features_labeled_clean.csv")
X = df.drop(columns=["prediabetes_flag"])

#fill NA like training
for col in X.columns:
    if X[col].dtype == "O":
        X[col] = X[col].fillna("Unknown")
    else:
        X[col] = X[col].fillna(0)

sample = X.iloc[[0]]  # one valid observation

#print as a list of records
payload = sample.to_dict(orient="records")
resp = requests.post(f"{API}/predict", json=payload, timeout=10)
print("STATUS:", resp.status_code)
print("BODY:", resp.text)

```
